classification.reason: 目标框位于右上角 'Brake Data' 表格区域，内容为制动器静摩擦、24VDC 电压和 7.2w 功率参数；不包含连接器针脚定义或反馈信号，也不是扭矩-转速曲线。在给定类别中最接近机械图纸参数信息，归入机械尺寸类。

classification.reason: 目标框内为标注为DB 15M的15针D-sub接口针位示意，显示针脚编号1、5、6、10、11、15及孔位排列；在完整图中该小图位于Connector Detail Feedback Wire区域旁，与反馈线针脚功能表对应，因此属于反馈连接器针脚定义。

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: This drawing shows the pin numbering layout for a DB15M feedback connector. Six pin numbers are clearly marked: 5, 10, 15 at the top row positions, and 1, 6, 11 at the bottom row positions. The circular features represent pin positions in the standard DB15 configuration.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Complete pin layout numbering (pins 2, 3, 4, 7, 8, 9, 12, 13, 14) are present as physical positions but not numerically labeled in this view.

unresolved_items.description: Multiple OCR detections of circle symbols ('○', 'O') at various pin positions
unresolved_items.reason: These are pin position indicators (physical holes/pins), not text annotations. They represent the unlabeled pins in the DB15M connector layout.
Very low confidence (0.088714, 0.925447) detections that appear to be artifacts or partial circle misreads. No visible 'C' character in the drawing.
Low confidence (0.412627) detection likely from connector outline or pin separator. Not a dimension or label.

These appear to be misreads or composite artifacts. Visual inspection shows no diameter callouts or these specific values. The '5o' is likely the pin number 5 misread with 90° rotation artifact. The '900' may be a rotated misread of pin holes.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框位于全图中 'Connector Detail (Power Wire)' 区域，裁剪内容为三列表格，明确给出 PIN 1-4 与 'MOTOR U'、'MOTOR V'、'MOTOR W'、'MOTOR PE⏚' 及线色 'YELLOW'、'RED'、'BLACK'、'YELLOW/GREEN' 的对应关系，属于电机动力线 U/V/W/PE 接线定义。

classification.reason: 目标框内为4孔连接器正视外形，标出孔位编号1、2、3、4及物料文字'Housing:H66L6-04P'、'Terminal:T66L6-B'；未在目标框内给出针脚功能、线色或接线关系，因此按连接器外形及物料信息归入机械尺寸类。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Four φ5.5mm mounting holes on a φ70±0.1mm pitch circle diameter, positioned at 45° intervals. Tight tolerance on PCD ensures accurate alignment.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Housing outer diameter D60mm. Connector cables must extend minimum L>300mm on both left and right sides.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Three connectors visible at top, each requiring minimum 300mm cable length for installation clearance and routing flexibility.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Shaft interface dimensions, key dimensions, axial length, and connector electrical specifications are not visible in this cropped region. OCR fragments 'F' and '节' appear to be noise or partial characters from adjacent regions and do not correspond to engineering callouts in the visible drawing.

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence (0.397), large rotated bounding box, does not match any visible dimension callout or label in the drawing. Likely OCR noise from structural lines or adjacent region.
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Delete - not a valid engineering annotation

unresolved_items.reason: Medium-low confidence (0.523), Chinese character without clear engineering context in this mechanical dimension view. May be fragment from title block or adjacent region.
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Delete - not part of dimensional specification in this region

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内为标题为 'Performance Curve' 的性能曲线图，纵轴标注 'T(N.m)' 表示扭矩，横轴标注 'n(rpm)' 表示转速，并包含 'Intermittent' 与 'Continuous' 两条工作区域曲线及 4.2、3.81、1.4、1.27 等扭矩数值，工程含义为电机扭矩随转速变化的曲线。

text_annotations.correction_note: Combined title from two OCR boxes
OCR detected as '∅09', visually appears to be 6000

terminology_notes: Performance curve shows intermittent and continuous operating regions

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: This is a motor performance curve showing torque vs. speed characteristics for intermittent and continuous operation. Intermittent operation provides higher torque (4.2 N.m at 0 rpm, 3.81 N.m at 3000 rpm) compared to continuous operation (1.4 N.m at 0 rpm, 1.27 N.m at 3000 rpm). Maximum speed appears to be 6000 rpm where both curves reach zero torque.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框是技术数据表中的环境条件区，包含'Temperature'、'Humidity'、'Environment'和'Installation altitude'等运行环境参数；在给定类别中不属于曲线或连接器针脚定义，最接近机械图纸通用尺寸/说明信息类别。

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
